subcodes.first_line: O faithful friend of Abdu'l-Baha! That which thou didst write to his honor Aqa Siyyid Taqi was noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار باوفای عبدالبهاء آنچه بجناب آقا سید تقی مرقوم نموده بودید ملحوظ گردید
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @rejection, opposition and persecution
